name: Sochie Heim
description: Second daughter of the Heim family. Sochie is a spoiled, headstrong tomboy who is continually overshadowed by her sister Kihel. She was determined to join the Inglessa Militia even before Dianna Counter's attack, and is among the first to pilot one of Sid Munzer's excavated mobile suits. Eventually Sochie becomes a well-respected soldier, though her AMX-109 Kapool is one of the weakest mobile suits in the series. ~!The death of Sochie's father causes her to hate the Moonrace and she feels betray

name: Toki Kouzuki
description: __Height:__ 190 cm (6'3") __Devil Fruit:__ ~! Toki Toki no Mi (Time-Time Fruit)!~ __Devil Fruit Type:__ ~!Paramecia!~ Toki Kouzuki was the wife of the daimyo of Kuri, [Oden Kouzuki](https://anilist.co/character/149797), the mother of [Momonosuke](https://anilist.co/character/126184) and Hiyori ~![(Komurasaki)](https://anilist.co/character/131435)!~, and the matriarch of the Kouzuki Family. She was killed by Kaido 20 years ago.

name: Ul
description: Ul is a very powerful ice mage that trained both Leon and Gray. While Ul and her first apprentice Leon were walking through a town where the evil demon Deliora had just rampaged they found one lone survivor who happened to be Gray. From that day on Ul had trained both the boys to become ice mages and even began seeing them as her own two sons. It was later revealed that Ultear is Ul's daughter and Siegrain commented that if Ul was alive, she would most likely be one of the Ten Holy Mages. ~!Ul s

name: V
description: V is Dante's mysterious client who sets the events of the story of Devil May Cry 5 in motion.

name: Vasily
description: Vasily is a young, Russian sniper with sharp eyes, a furrowed brow and medium length wavy hair with long sideburns that covers his cheeks and chin. He wears a light ushanka hat, a light waist-belt coat, dark gloves and pants. Vasily also carries a sniper rifle, binoculars and a bag around his shoulders. name: Void
description: A member of the God Hand with a large, exposed brain, eyes stitched shut and lips peeled back. Void is the one who brands the sacrifices made by tortured souls in order for them to become apostles and achieve their dream.
mediaTitles: Berserk: The Golden Age Arc III - The Advent

description: A member of Burning Rescue who, like Galo, is in her teens. She is cool, calm, and professional at all times, and does things at her own pace. She plays the straight man to Galo and Varys.

name: Alexis Ness
description: __Height:__ 181 cm (5'11") __Team:__ Bastard München __Position:__ Offensive Midfielder Alexis Ness is the center midfielder and beating heart of the Bastard München U20s team, Ness' ability to dribble and pass are heavily relied on as all of [Kaiser's](https://anilist.co/character/268963/Michael-Kaiser) shots are started with Ness, and in turn, every Bastard Münchens play.

name: Banri Oogami
description: Banri is a staff member working at the music agency Takanashi Productions, he is a kind man who is very helpful to the agency.

name: Beelach
description: [Emul's](https://anilist.co/character/281522/Emul) older sister and the eldest daughter of [Vysache](https://anilist.co/character/281523/Vysache). She inherited the craft of blacksmithing from her father, and holds his skills in high esteem. She speaks a sort of "pseudo-Hiroshima dialect" that is subtly laced with the common tongue. As a blacksmith, she possesses a high level of proficiency and is capable of crafting exceptionally powerful weapons.

name: Beelzebumon
description: Beelzebumon is a Demon Lord Digimon whose name and design are derived from the mythological Beelzebub. One of the "Seven Great Demon Lords", it represents Venus and the sin of Gluttony. While it possesses the power to command the many Devil Digimon, it dares to observe a solitary existence. It is said that it could stand at the peak of the dark army, "Nightmare Soldiers", if it cared to, although it is also said that there exists a Demon Lord Digimon which surpasses even Beelzebumon. It rides on

name: Brau-1589
description: Brau-1589 is the first robot to ever kill a human, taking place 8 years before the events of Pluto.

name: Cardinal
description: Cardinal was the embodiment of the Cardinal System in Underworld that had inherited the Cardinal System's sub-process of performing error checks on the main process, which was integrated into Quinella. After her first battle with Quinella, she took refuge in the Great Library Room.

name: Choi Mochimazzi

description: A fortune teller from the tropical place that Dera comes from who is sent to stay with Tamako to check up on Dera. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Dhomochevsky
description: A special Safeguard who with his companion Iko protects all the people on his level from Silicon Creatures regardless of Net Terminal Genes.

name: Felicia Mitsuki
description: Felicia is a spirited Magical Girl, full of energy and determination, who hates Witches for taking the lives of her parents. She now works as a mercenary, hunting Witches all across Kamihama. Her tough talk hides a kind heart and a love of animals.

name: Four Murasame
description: After the One Year War, the girl who would become Four Murasame lost her family, and was adopted by the Murasame Research Lab. It was there were the Federation used and trained her to become an artificial New Type (or "Cyber - New Type"). The scientist in charge of the project erased all her memories from her previous life and just gave her number 'Four' as the name. name: Fujimasa March
description: __Height:__ 170 cm Fujimasa March is a scholarship student at the Kasamatsu Training Academy. She was considered the best in her class and set her sights on winning the Tokai Derby. [Oguri Cap](https://anilist.co/character/96114/Oguri-Cap) is the first person she would consider as a rival.

name: Furina
description: The "Regina of All Waters, Kindreds, Peoples and Laws" is deeply loved by her people. She follows each and every trial held at the Opera Epiclese with an inextinguishable passion, and is always acutely aware of how the "audience" sees things.
